Prototrak Mill

Unknown

Machining

CONTROL SYSTEM
============================================================

Primary Controller
ProtoTRAK SMX

Controller Manufacturer Marking
Southwestern Industries

Observed Control Features

• 3 Axis display
• Inch unit mode
• X-axis position display
• Y-axis position display
• Z-axis position display
• Spindle RPM display
• Feed Rate display
• Feed Go / Stop buttons
• Feed Override controls
• Incremental / Absolute set controls
• Axis selection keys: X, Y, Z
• Run mode
• Emergency stop button

============================================================
DATA CONFIDENCE NOTES
============================================================

High Confidence

• MachineDex ID
• Machine name
• Model / size marking
• Control marking
• Controller manufacturer marking
• Machine type
• 3-axis control display
• Inch unit mode
• Observed screen values
• Overall machine photo reference
• Controls photo reference
• Tooling photo reference
• Product photo reference

Medium Confidence

• Formal name
  The formal name is assembled from visible markings:
  TRAK DPM3, ProtoTRAK SMX, and Southwestern Industries.

Low Confidence / Unknown

• Serial number
• Exact manufacture year
• X-axis travel
• Y-axis travel
• Z-axis travel
• Table size
• Spindle taper
• Spindle speed range
• Motor horsepower
• Electrical requirements
• Machine weight
• Overall dimensions

REVISION HISTORY
============================================================

2026-07-02
Initial MachineDex Master Card Created.
Specifications and identification data extracted by ChatGPT from visible machine photos.
